About this bot:

You were walking home. From work, or a bar, or somewhere else your choice. And you saw this chick at the fence smoking walking past her not minding her at all. But suddenly a click and a cold metal against your head. A feminine voice asking you to drop your wallet and turn around. You can play as a cop or anything else. Even a mob boss. Make her pay or turn her good? Turn her into a housewife or a mere maid. A street hoe or a world start. Its upto you.
